title: Warm up
content: Three images depict taxi driver perspectives from inside cars in three different Chinese cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each scene shows distinct urban and cultural characteristics of the city viewed through the windshield.
key_claims: Beijing scene shows a modern highway with skyscrapers and traditional architecture, driver using tech dashboard
Chongqing scene shows a driver reading a book with mountainous, layered traditional buildings and a cable car visible
Hangzhou scene shows a driver using a smartphone with lake, greenery, and futuristic tech icons displayed

title: An Evolving Nation: A Ride Through China
content: This title slide introduces the presentation theme, using a taxi motif to symbolize a journey through China's cities. It features images of a taxi sign and iconic architecture from different Chinese cities, including the Forbidden City and a pagoda.
key_claims: The presentation is themed as 'A Ride Through China'
Focuses on China as an evolving nation
Uses taxi imagery to connect the journey concept across cities

title: Session 1: Match the City Chain! - Investigate and Research
content: This slide outlines the structure of Session 1, which involves investigating and researching Chinese cities. It presents a three-step process flow connecting local features, development strategies, and outcomes/positive impacts, alongside an isometric illustration of a city.
key_claims: The session follows a three-step process: Local Features → Development Strategies → Outcomes & Positive Impact
The activity involves matching cities in a chain based on research

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This is an interactive matching exercise slide where three Chinese cities (Beijing, Chongqing, Hangzhou) are paired with their corresponding development strategies. Lines connect each city to a strategy, with images of city landmarks displayed on the right.
key_claims: Beijing is matched with Technology & tradition integration (融合)
Chongqing is matched with Tourism & Economic growth
Hangzhou is matched with Sustainable urban development

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: This slide summarizes the three city scenes from the warm-up, labeling each with its associated development strategy, and concludes with an overarching insight about China's evolving development approach. It emphasizes that each city tailors its strategy to local conditions.
key_claims: Beijing scene represents sustainable urban development
Chongqing scene represents tourism & economic growth
Hangzhou scene represents technology & tradition integration
China is an evolving nation with unique development strategies per city
Each city develops strategies based on local features to promote city development (因地制宜)
